scope: Google sign-in and first-party cookie session on the local Web origin
apiTarget: deployed Railway API through the local same-origin proxy

checks.name: google_authorized_origin
checks.evidence: Google popup completed after http://localhost:3000 was added to the OAuth client's authorized JavaScript origins.

checks.name: google_challenge
checks.evidence: POST /api/v4/auth/google/challenge returned HTTP 201 through the local Web proxy.

checks.name: google_callback
checks.evidence: The Google credential callback completed and returned the browser to the home page.

checks.name: signed_in_home_header
checks.evidence: The home header removed the anonymous Log in control and rendered the authenticated account control plus My rooms.

checks.name: cookie_session_refresh
checks.evidence: After a full reload, GET /api/v4/auth/me rehydrated the authenticated home header from the first-party cookie session.

secretHandling: No Google credential, session cookie, email address, access token, challenge nonce, or API secret is stored in this artifact.
